headline: Oklo Moves One Step Closer to Commercialization
summary: Oklo (NYSE:OKLO) has become a poster child for the nuclear renaissance powering the AI buildout, and the advanced fission developer just stacked another regulatory and fuel-supply win onto a thesis built entirely on future revenue. The Santa Clara company has been selected by the U.S. Department of Energy for advanced negotiations under the Surplus Plutonium ... Oklo Moves One Step Closer to Commercialization
